proposed_relations.description: Both records describe the identical First Avenue/Second Avenue SBS corridor from South Ferry to 125th Street in Manhattan. The only difference is the source document: corridor_first-second-avenues-brt aggregates multiple sources including 2010_03_11_brt_1st2nd_cb8, while corridor_first-second-ave-sbs derives from 2010_03_10_brt_1st2nd_cb3 — two presentations for the same SBS project given to different community boards on consecutive days.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 8.5 miles from South Ferry to 125 th Street

decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id (corridor_first-second-avenues-brt) already exists in the registry and already references the same source (2010_03_11_brt_1st2nd_cb8). The observation describes the identical corridor: First Avenue/Second Avenue from South Ferry to 125th Street in Manhattan, 8.5 miles served by M15 bus route. No different registry record is a closer match.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 8.5 miles from South Ferry to 125 th Street
Currently served by M15 bus route
